ValidationRule.description: PRIOR: MM NEW: MG 2202.09.22 cleaned up formatting + Error Msg
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE, ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE( Status ),"New"), ISPICKVAL( Status, "Complaint PKI Closed") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_003: You cannot change the status directly from New to Complaint PKI Closed
